items.title: Mass Cuts at Pace Gallery
items.summary: The mega gallery cuts 100 workers and artists. Plus, a terrible movie about Kate Moss and Lucian Freud, and honoring the giant behind “Persepolis.”

items.title: Art Movements: Meet MoMA's New Photo Chief
items.summary: Also, the Asian Cultural Council awards $1.6M in grants to artists, and at least one sector of the art market is hot as hell.

items.title: Marjane Satrapi, "Persepolis" Author and Human Rights Fighter, Dies at 56
items.summary: One of her friends said the artist and filmmaker “died of sadness” after her husband’s death just over a year ago.

items.title: Required Reading
items.summary: This week: Esperanto on Duolingo, a Black Panther Party stud grandma, Arsenal and Africa, queer fish, the secret leftist history of Renaissance faires, and more.
